title: centaurea aristata subsp. geresensis
intro: Centaurea aristata subsp. geresensis is a rare, endemic species of thistle, belonging to the Asteraceae family and native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as providing relief from fever and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared for herbal use by infusing its flowers and leaves in hot water or making a decoction, and it is also used in the production of essential oils and tinctures.
